testcase.name: Address_information

error.message: element click intercepted: Element <button type="submit" data-qa="create-account" class="btn btn-default">...</button> is not clickable at point (356, 678). Other element would receive the click: <iframe id="aswift_1" name="aswift_1" style="min-height: auto; max-height: none; min-width: auto; max-width: none; width: 1005px !important; height: 124px !important;
